steps: 1. The pizza is cut into 4 equal slices, so the whole pizza is 4/4. 2. Tom eats 1 slice, which is 1/4 of the pizza. 3. Fraction left = whole pizza - eaten part = 4/4 - 1/4 = 3/4. 4. Check options: A) 1/4 is the part eaten, not left. B) 1/2 is equivalent to 2/4, but 2/4 is also an option (D). C) 3/4 is correct. D) 2/4 simplifies to 1/2, which is not the exact fraction left unless simplified, but the question asks for fraction left, and 3/4 is the exact unsimplified fraction left. E) 4/4 is the whole pizza before eating. 5. Only 3/4 is mathematically correct and matches exactly one option.
